# Orphan

A doc whose tags overlap with no other fixture doc. Used to verify
the suggester returns "no automatic suggestion" — wait, this one has
tags. It's used as a non-matching tag-set partner: it should never
appear in suggestions for `auth.md` or `session.md`.
